name: BB:CategoryDefinition: IRC Detected Based on Application
notes: This Building Block identifies IRC traffic that has been identified by application testing.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: IRC Detected Based on Application on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow matches Application is Chat.IRC
when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: IRC Detected Based on Application on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches Application is Chat.IRC
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
